positive: A vibrant and dynamic graphic illustration of a stylized forest creature (like a playful fox or otter) intertwined with geometric botanical elements. The scene should feature a clean, central composition suitable for a t-shirt print, using a limited, highly contrasting color palette of deep emerald green, burnt orange, and creamy white. The art style must be a modern, simplified line art mixed with solid blocks of color (graphic design style), emphasizing bold silhouettes and clean outlines. Focus on strong contrast and a whimsical, nature-inspired aesthetic. Minimal background complexity to allow for garment printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low contrast, noisy, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, logo, copyrighted characters, realistic photography
